                                                                                  About Us

                                                                                  Theerthaa is a reliable organic shop that sells the best certified organic Indian products and healthy foods to every home in Chennai, both online and offline. We work closely with dedicated farmers to get clean ingredients, like snacks high in protein and zero calorie foods, to help families get easy and healthy access to good nutrition.

                                                                                  SHOP NOW

                                                                                  200+

                                                                                  Products

                                                                                  Wide range of healthy food choices

                                                                                  20+

                                                                                  Farmer Partnerships

                                                                                  Sourcing directly from reliable farmers

                                                                                  100%

                                                                                  Normal Promise

                                                                                  Pure ingredients with no harmful additives

                                                                                  Organic Foods & Healthy Protein Choices

                                                                                  • Organic Store & Natural Foods
                                                                                    Fresh organic produce, natural foods, and high quality organic products for daily health.
                                                                                  • Best Organic Groceries
                                                                                    Buy the best organic rice, spices, millets and dry fruits focused on quality and nutrition.
                                                                                  • High Protein & Fitness Foods
                                                                                    Explore high protein snacks, healthy protein options, natural whey supplements, & smart low calorie foods.
                                                                                  • HeaIthy Weight Loss Snacks
                                                                                    Explore our organic shop's weight loss snacks inspired by authentic tradition for balanced healthy living.
